data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Booking cancellation if checklist not complete', but the evidence does not demonstrate any functionality or API endpoints that support this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for booking cancellation but does not provide concrete evidence of how this is implemented or enforced. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of booking cancellation mechanism if checklist is incomplete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for booking cancellation logic
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that bookings are canceled when checklist is not complete.
